subcodes.first_line: O ye yearning one's who are quickened by the breeze of the love of God, flowing from the meadows of the Abha Kingdom.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المشتاقون المهتزون من سریان نسیم محبت الله من ریاض ملکوت الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
